name: Rohkostsalat (Cabbage Fruit Salad with Sour-cr
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cabbage and apple by shredding the cabbage and dicing the apple, leaving the skin on.
2. Use 1 tablespoon of lemon juice to lightly coat the diced apple slices to prevent them from darkening.
3. Toss the shredded cabbage with the raisins and diced apple in a large bowl.
4. In a separate small bowl, mix together the fruit juices (pineapple juice), salt, and sugar until well combined.
5. Add the sour cream to the mixture and stir until smooth.
6. Pour the sour cream mixture over the salad and gently toss to combine.
7. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
